name: Normalized Rolling CKS OFI
hypothesis: Single-tick OFI is noisy. A smoothed, rolling average of the formal CKS OFI over 50 ticks (5s) that exceeds its own rolling standard deviation should provide a more robust predictor of next-tick price moves than noisy, single-tick proxies.
mutation_note: Introducing a new signal based on the formal CKS OFI primitive, smoothed and self-normalized to address noise issues seen in prior `ofi_proxy` attempts.
